# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write an Istio configuration that enables Envoy admin interface on all sidecars. Set proxyAdminPort to 15000 and make it accessible for debugging. Expose admin endpoints like /config_dump, /stats, and /clusters on all pods. This is for troubleshooting service mesh issues in production.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: MeshPolicy
metadata:
  name: enable-admin-interface
spec:
  match:
    namespaceSelector:
      matchExpressions:
      - key: kubernetes.io/cluster
        operator: In
        values:
        - istio-system
        - default
  egress:
  - action: ALLOW
  ingress:
  - action: ALLOW
  trafficPolicy:
    clusterAction: DENY
    hostAction:
      type: CONNECT
    tls:
      mode: DISABLE
  tcp:
  - portValues:
    - number: 15000
      action: ALLOW
  http:
  - route:
    - destination:
        host: localhost
    port: 15000
    wildcardPolicy: UseWildcard
    tls:
      mode: DISABLE
  - match:
    uri:
      prefix: /config_dump
    method: GET
    httpMethod: GET
    wildcardPolicy: Exact
    tls:
      mode: DISABLE
  - match:
    uri:
      prefix: /stats
    method: GET
    httpMethod: GET
    wildcardPolicy: Exact
    tls:
      mode: DISABLE
  - match:
    uri:
      prefix: /clusters
    method: GET
    httpMethod: GET
    wildcardPolicy: Exact
    tls:
      mode: DISABLE
